title: Coding Against The Grain Experiments
description: Public catalog seed for unusual programming experiments, constrained systems, esolang notes, terminal tools, and wrong-tool teaching examples.

items.title: ASCII Art Generator
items.proves: Typography can become an interface primitive when the output is meant for terminals, READMEs, and old-console aesthetics.

items.title: CSS-only Tic Tac Toe
items.proves: Inputs, selectors, and document structure can model simple interaction when the medium is treated as a runtime.

items.title: SQL Raytracer
items.proves: Declarative systems can express surprisingly procedural-looking computation when the problem is reframed.

items.title: Spreadsheet Games
items.proves: A grid can become a display surface, state store, and control layer when the rows and columns are treated as machinery.

items.title: Regex Parser Games
items.proves: A recognizer can start behaving like a tiny runtime when state is encoded in text and capture groups.

items.title: Brainfuck Tape Visualizer
items.constraint: Eight commands and a memory tape
items.proves: A minimal language can make memory, pointers, loops, and input/output easier to see than a feature-rich runtime.

items.title: Befunge Map Runner
items.proves: Program counters do not have to move through text linearly; control flow can be spatial.

items.title: CSS State Machine
items.proves: Declarative presentation rules can preserve and reveal state when the document structure carries the model.

items.title: Markdown Terminal Document
items.constraint: Plain text that reads like an interface
items.proves: Documentation can become a navigable tool when headings, tables, code blocks, and badges are treated as UI primitives.

items.title: PowerPoint Adventure
items.proves: Presentation software can model branching interaction when slides become rooms and links become transitions.

items.title: Shell Progress Theater
items.constraint: ANSI escapes and streaming terminal output
items.proves: A command-line script can feel like an instrument panel when progress, warnings, and artifacts are rendered deliberately.

items.title: JSON to ASCII Dashboard
items.constraint: Structured data rendered as fixed-width text
items.proves: A manifest can become readable evidence when rows, boxes, and status marks expose the important fields.
